Package org.solenopsis.soap.metadata

Class OpportunitySettings

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.metadata.Metadata
org.solenopsis.soap.metadata.OpportunitySettings
public class OpportunitySettings extends Metadata

Java class for OpportunitySettings complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="OpportunitySettings">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}Metadata">
       <sequence>
         <element name="autoActivateNewReminders" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="customizableProductSchedulesEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="doesEnforceStandardOpportunitySaveLogic" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableExpandedPipelineInspectionSetup" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableFindSimilarOpportunities" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableForecastCategoryMetrics" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableOpportunityFieldHistoryTracking" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableOpportunityInsightsInMobile" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableOpportunityTeam" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enablePipelineChangesMetrics" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enablePipelineInspection" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enablePipelineInspectionFlow" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enablePipelineInspectionSingleCategoryRollup" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableRevenueInsights" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableServiceCaseInsights" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableUpdateReminders" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="findSimilarOppFilter" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}FindSimilarOppFilter" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="oppAmountDealMotionEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="oppCloseDateDealMotionEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="promptToAddProducts" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="pushCountEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="simpleOppCreateFromContact" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="simpleOppCreateFromEvent" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </extension>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>
